title: Alex's Zombies
description: Adds four new zombies to your world.
body:
Welcome to Alex's zombies! This is a mod that aims to improve zombies a bit by adding four new variants:

Sloth Zombie, a slow mob that gets the speed effect when hit.

Spitter Zombie, a ranged mob that shoot poisonous spit at it's victims.

Headless Zombie, a fast mob which inflicts wither and hunger.

Parazombie, a faster variant of the zombie.

This mod is perfect for those who want a small challenge in your game, and even better to add in a zombie apocalypse modpack! 

Also headless zombie and parazombie textured, modeled, and animated by @Asterope-here on pixilart. Go check him out!
